package.name: AIRender
package.description: Stylized AI image rendering for FreeCAD: capture the active 3D viewport (color + a geometry-faithful line-art control image), send it as img2img/ControlNet-style input to a BYO-key image model -- a local ComfyUI endpoint by default (zero cost, no account), or Stability AI / OpenAI with your own API key -- and save the styled result next to your document. Complements the unmaintained Render workbench: fast/stylized instead of slow/physically-accurate. No bundled billing, no bundled models -- you bring the provider.
